Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.StringValidator

Packages that use StringValidator 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of StringValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return StringValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static StringValidator DefaultRequirements.validateThat​(String actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a String.
    StringValidator Requirements.validateThat​(String actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a String.

  • Uses of StringValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return StringValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringValidator StringValidator.asInetAddress​(Consumer<InetAddressValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator StringValidator.asUri​(Consumer<UriValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator StringValidator.asUrl​(Consumer<UrlValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator StringValidator.contains​(String expected)
    Ensures that the actual value contains a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.doesNotContain​(String value)
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.doesNotEndWith​(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not end with a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.doesNotStartWith​(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value does not start with a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.endsWith​(String suffix)
    Ensures that the actual value ends with a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.isEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is empty.
    StringValidator StringValidator.isNotEmpty()
    Ensures that the actual value is not empty.
    StringValidator StringValidator.isTrimmed()
    Ensures that the actual value does not contain leading or trailing whitespace.
    StringValidator StringValidator.length​(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.
    StringValidator StringValidator.startsWith​(String prefix)
    Ensures that the actual value starts with a value.
    StringValidator StringValidator.trim()
    Trims whitespace at the beginning and end of the actual value.
    StringValidator JavaRequirements.validateThat​(String actual, String name)
    Validates the requirements of a String.

  • Uses of StringValidator in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension that return StringValidator 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    StringValidator ExtensibleObjectValidator.asString()
    Returns a verifier for the String representation of the actual value.

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S ExtensibleObjectValidator.asString​(Consumer<StringValidator> consumer)
    Validates nested requirements.

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement StringValidator 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  StringValidatorImpl
    Default implementation of StringValidator.
    class  StringValidatorNoOp
    A StringValidator that ignores subsequent validations due to an incompatible type conversion.
